title: Glass Tube Rotameter
shortDescription: Mainly used for measuring rated flow of liquid and gases.
description:
Available in C.S, S.S 304, S.S 316, Polypropelene, P.T.F.E Lined.

  • Flanged, Screwed, Hose Nipple & TC Joint connections
  • Available from 15 NB to 100 NB pipe size
  • Ranges between 30 to 30,000 LPH of Water
  • Accuracy of ±2% FSD
  • High & Low flow switches

title: Metal Tube Rotameter
shortDescription: Instrument used to measure instant flow rate of Liquids and Gases.
description:
Can be used for metering of translucent/opaque fluids under high operating pressure and temperature.

  • Available is SS 304, S.S 316, P.P
  • Flanged size from 15 NB to 150 NB
  • Accuracy ±2% FSD
  • High and Low Flow switch on request

title: Reflex / Transparent Level Gauge
shortDescription: Special instruments for High Pressure & Temperature liquid storage tanks.
description:
Designed for Fertilizer, Pharma & Chemical Industries.

  • Designed upto 100 bar & temperature maximum 400°C
  • Available in MS/SS-304/SS-316/PP/MS with FEP/PFA Lined
  • Max 3 Mtrs length in single piece
  • Available in IBR also

title: Float and Board Type Level Gauge
shortDescription: Suitable for Big and Overhead Tanks of non pressurized and non-hazardous Chemical storage Tanks.
description:
Installation available for Ground Level Tank, Overhead Level Tank and Underground Level Tank.

  • Wide Range Tank Height: Guided (up to 20m), Non-Guided (up to 8m)
  • Specific Gravity ≥ 0.8
  • Application Temperature Range: Up to 100°C
  • Wetted Parts: SS 316

title: LOW FLOW ROTAMERS (ACRYLIC BODY/GLASS TUBE)
description:
• Available in SS 316/ SS 304/P.P/ P.T.F.E Lined

  • Construction.

  • Generally screwded with flow control valve at inlet.

  • 10 LPH to 150 LPH of water at ambient Temperature and 20 to 5000NLPH of Air at NTP Condition.

  • Accuracy ±2% FSD

  • Panel mounted with high and low flow switches available.

  • Flanged, Screwded, Hose Nipple & TC Joint connection.
shortDescription: For Low flowrate of Gas or Liquid.
